name: Nantucket Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and light brown sugar together until smooth.
2. Stir in the molasses and water.
3. Sift together the flour and baking soda.
4. Drop heaping teaspoons of dough onto well-buttered cookie sheets.
5. Bake for 11-12 minutes.
6. Loosen cookies from the pan using a spatula, but do not remove until slightly cooled.
7. Transfer to a cookie rack when cool, then store in a tightly covered container.
NOTE: To make Nantucket Ginger Cookies, add 1 teaspoon ground ginger.
